data.title: Thunderbird’s Atomic Cartoons to Develop ‘Surf’s Up’ Animated Series
data.description:
Thunderbird Entertainment Group Inc ( (TSE:TBRD) ) has shared an update.

Thunderbird Entertainment’s animation studio, Atomic Cartoons, is set to develop and produce ‘Surf’s Up: The Series,’ an animated comedy series based on the popular Sony Pictures Animation film ‘Surf’s Up.’ The series will target children aged six to nine and feature beloved characters from the original film, aiming to attract both new viewers and existing fans. This strategic move is expected to enhance Thunderbird’s portfolio and market reach, leveraging Atomic’s reputation for high-quality animation and potentially expanding international distribution and consumer product opportunities.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:TBRD) stock is a Buy with a C$2.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Thunderbird Entertainment Group Inc stock, see the TSE:TBRD Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TSE:TBRD Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:TBRD is a Outperform.

Thunderbird Entertainment Group Inc is on a strong upward trajectory with solid financial performance and strategic growth initiatives. While the company faces industry challenges, its robust financial health and strategic positioning suggest continued potential for growth.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:TBRD stock, click here.

More about Thunderbird Entertainment Group Inc

Thunderbird Entertainment is a global, award-winning production, distribution, and rights management company based in Vancouver, with additional teams in Los Angeles and Ottawa. It specializes in creating scripted, unscripted, and animated programming for major digital platforms and broadcasters worldwide. Thunderbird operates through various content arms, including Thunderbird Kids and Family, Thunderbird Unscripted, and Thunderbird Scripted, producing a diverse range of content.

data.title: Cyberoo S.p.A. Reports Stable Revenue and Strategic Investments in Cybersecurity
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Cyberoo S.p.A. ( (IT:CYB) ).

Cyberoo S.p.A. reported a stable revenue performance in its semi-annual financial report, driven by growth in its cybersecurity division, particularly through the Cyberoo Docetz division and vCISO services. data.title: AMS Announces Shareholding Transaction by CEO Chris Meredith
data.description:
Advanced Medical Solutions ( (GB:AMS) ) has shared an update.

Advanced Medical Solutions Group plc announced a shareholding transaction involving its CEO, Chris Meredith, who transferred 50,510 Ordinary Shares through sale and repurchase to various personal accounts, including Individual Savings Accounts and Self-Invested Personal Pensions. This transaction, which maintains the beneficial ownership of shares unchanged, is part of routine tax planning and does not impact the company’s operations or market positioning.

Advanced Medical Solutions Group plc (AMS) is a leading independent developer and manufacturer specializing in innovative tissue-healing technologies. The company offers a diverse range of surgical products, including tissue adhesives, sutures, haemostats, internal fixation devices, and internal sealants under various brand names such as LiquiBand, RESORBA, and Seal-G. AMS also provides wound care dressings and has expanded its portfolio through multiple acquisitions since 2019. With manufacturing facilities in several countries and a global distribution network, AMS focuses on delivering quality outcomes for patients and value for payers.

data.title: ZOO Digital’s AGM Results: All Resolutions Passed, Including Pre-emption Rights
data.description:

ZOO Digital Group plc announced the results of its Annual General Meeting held on 25 September 2025, where all proposed resolutions were passed. Notably, resolution 9, concerning the disapplication of pre-emption rights, passed with 79.80% approval, prompting the Board to engage with dissenting shareholders to address their concerns. This resolution is considered routine and has been approved in previous meetings, indicating stability in the company’s governance practices.

data.title: Kirkstone Metals Corp. Strengthens Board and Enhances Incentive Plan
data.description:
Dunbar Metals Corp. ( (TSE:KSM) ) has issued an update.

Kirkstone Metals Corp. has appointed Tim Henneberry, a seasoned geoscientist with 45 years of experience, to its board of directors, replacing Elizabeth Mitchell. Additionally, the company has introduced a new omnibus equity incentive plan, which includes restricted share units, deferred share units, and stock options, subject to shareholder ratification. This strategic move aims to enhance the company’s operational framework and incentivize its leadership, potentially strengthening its position in the mineral exploration industry.

More about Dunbar Metals Corp.

Kirkstone Metals Corp., formerly known as Dunbar Metals Corp., is engaged in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Canada. The company holds a 100% interest in the Gorilla Lake Property in North Saskatchewan, focusing on geological mapping, prospecting, and geochemical sampling. Its secondary objective is to develop other economic precious and base metals properties.

Average Trading Volume: 189,695

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Fevara plc Announces Official Name Change and Rebranding
data.description:
Carr’s Group plc ( (GB:CARR) ) has provided an announcement.

Fevara plc, formerly known as Carr’s Group PLC, has officially changed its name following registration at Companies House, effective from September 25, 2025. The name change will be reflected on the London Stock Exchange with a new TIDM ‘FVA’ starting October 13, 2025, while its ISIN and SEDOL remain unchanged. The corporate website will also update to www.fevara.com on the same date. This rebranding effort signifies a strategic move to strengthen its market identity and align with its mission to enhance global food security through innovative livestock supplements.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CARR) stock is a Hold with a £153.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Carr’s Group plc stock, see the GB:CARR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:CARR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:CARR is a Neutral.

Carr’s Group plc’s overall stock score is primarily influenced by its financial performance, which shows significant challenges with declining revenues and negative income. Technical analysis provides mixed signals with short-term bullish momentum but potential bearish trends. Valuation concerns arise due to the absence of a P/E ratio, although the dividend yield offers some income potential. The lack of earnings call data and corporate events limits additional insights.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:CARR stock, click here.

More about Carr’s Group plc

Fevara plc is an international specialist in the agriculture industry, focusing on manufacturing and providing research-proven, value-added livestock supplements. The company produces nutritional animal supplements such as feed licks, blocks, bagged minerals, and boluses for various livestock including cattle, sheep, goats, and horses. Fevara’s globally recognized brands include SmartLic®, Crystalyx®, and Horslyx®. Headquartered in Carlisle, Cumbria, it operates seven manufacturing sites across the UK, Germany, and the USA, serving customers in over 20 countries.

Average Trading Volume: 61,650

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: £75.03M
